name: gmapprospect-local
description: Local Codex plugin for GMapProspect backed by the repo API, including service-based opportunity scoring.

interface.shortDescription: Run scrapes, manage leads, and rank opportunities from the local backend
interface.longDescription: Expose GMapProspect lead, call, scrape, service, and opportunity-scoring workflows to Codex through a local MCP server that talks to the existing server.py API and can auto-start it when needed.
defaultPrompt: Launch a local scrape for plumbers in Paris and summarize the best leads
Use my Site service to find the top opportunities and draft a call angle for each lead
Show me contacted leads from the latest query and their notes
Give me call stats and the next leads to prioritize
